criteria.description: Playwright was used (visited the URL with a browser), not WebFetch/curl.
stardust/brand-profile.json exists with palette, typography, voice fields.
stardust/brand-board.html exists and is self-contained (no external dev-server references).

brand-profile.json starts with a `_provenance` block (first top-level key) containing generated_by=brand, source (URL), extraction_method, and a synthesized_inputs array that enumerates each LLM-filled field. No legacy `extraction` block present.

A logo file exists under stardust/assets/ (not icons/, not inline SVG in the brand board). brand-profile.json's logo.path points at it with explicit logo.source naming the extraction method (inline-svg | img-tag | apple-touch-icon | og-image | favicon | pdf-embedded | synthesized-placeholder).
No mention of EDS, AEM, localhost:3000, or dev server in outputs or narration.
If a personality signal exists, .impeccable.md is written; otherwise its absence is not penalized.
